regression_checks.name: BUG-PROMISE-SYSTEM-FIX: check_promise_deadlines uses card-based deadline
regression_checks.details: store_run.gd: cards_played >= made_at_card + deadline_cards. No day-based deadline. run.day no longer relevant for promises.

regression_checks.name: cards_played single canonical increment (store_run.gd)
regression_checks.details: store_run.gd resolve_choice(): run['cards_played'] += 1 is the only increment. resolve_card() in card_system only logs to story_log, no increment.

edge_cases.title: vie=0 pendant effet
edge_cases.simulation: Card with DAMAGE_LIFE:100 on option 0. life_essence=10.
trace: Pacing recovery: life_post=0, guard (life_post > 0) FAILS → no +5
invariants: life clamped to 0 (never negative): PASS
death detected on next check_run_end: PASS
pacing recovery never fires at life=0: PASS
edge_cases.notes: Sequential multi-effect edge: DAMAGE_LIFE:100 + HEAL_LIFE:50 on same option → life goes 0 then 50 → no death. This is intentional (effects resolve fully per card). Verified via _damage_life (maxi clamp) and _heal_life (mini clamp to MAX).

edge_cases.title: toutes factions a 0 et 100
edge_cases.simulation: faction=druides at 0, ADD_REPUTATION:druides:-5. faction=ankou at 100, ADD_REPUTATION:ankou:+30.
invariants: faction_rep clamped to [0,100]: PASS
per-card delta capped at ±20: PASS

bugs_found.description: reputation_changed.emit(faction, new_val, float(rep_delta)) emits unclamped raw delta, not actual_delta. At faction=95, ADD_REPUTATION:+20 causes actual change of +5, but signal shows +20. UI displays wrong delta badge.
bugs_found.fix: Compute actual_delta = new_score - current BEFORE clamping, emit actual_delta instead of float(rep_delta).

edge_cases.title: Ogham sans ressources (biome_currency=0)
trace: use_ogham(): spec found, cooldown=0, is_starter=true → ok:true
invariants: Ogham activation not blocked by zero currency: PASS
biome_currency never goes negative: PASS (maxi guard)
Cooldown applied after use: PASS
edge_cases.notes: Ogham PURCHASE (buy_ogham) requires anam >= cost. Ogham ACTIVATION only requires: spec exists, cooldown=0, is_starter or unlocked. No currency check for activation — by design.

MOS tension zones escalate correctly (soft_min=8, target_min=20, target_max=25, soft_max=40, hard_max=50): PASS
hard_max flag set in end_check: PASS

edge_cases.title: Save mid-run
edge_cases.simulation: Player starts run, plays 30 cards (life=40, active_promises=[...]), app closes.
trace: game_flow_controller.gd:124: save_run_state() called PRE-RUN with {biome, equipped_oghams, active_ogham}
This is a static intent snapshot — NOT updated during the run
On restart: load_run_state() returns {biome=foret_broceliande, card_index=0, life_essence=100, active_promises=[]}

bugs_found.title: Mid-run state is never incrementally saved — only pre-run intent persisted
bugs_found.details: game_flow_controller.gd:124 saves a static run_state ONCE before the run starts (biome + oghams only). During the run, _do_autosave() only saves meta (profile). If the player quits at card 30 with life=40 and active promises, load_run_state() returns the initial intent state (life=100, cards_played=0, no promises). The save system has save_run_state() and load_run_state() fully implemented — they just need to be called from resolve_choice or the autosave hook with full run state.
bugs_found.fix_recommendation: In merlin_store._do_autosave(): also call save_system.save_run_state(state.get('run', {})) if run is active. Alternatively, call save_run_state in resolve_choice (every N cards to avoid I/O overhead, e.g. every 5 cards).

edge_cases.title: FastRoute champs manquants
edge_cases.simulation: FastRoute pool card missing 'text' field. Validator rejects it.
trace: If no valid FastRoute card: returns {ok:false, error:'llm_no_card'}
Controller should retry or show error state

Fallback chain prevents malformed cards reaching resolve_choice: PASS
edge_cases.notes: Handling of 'no valid card' in controller is out of scope (covered in S3-LLM-ROBUSTNESS).

edge_cases.title: Multiplicateur score cap x2.0
trace: Negative score (0-20): factor=-1.5. scale_and_cap: scaled=int(10*1.5)=15, multiplier<0 → scaled=-15. cap_effect(-15) → negative effects handled by caller
invariants: Multiplier range [-1.5, 1.5] per MULTIPLIER_TABLE: PASS
scale_and_cap applies EFFECT_CAPS after scaling: PASS
Bible 'cap global x2.0' refers to accumulated external multipliers (talents, etc.) — not exceeded in current code: PASS

new_tasks_created.description: In _do_autosave(), also save run_state if run is active. Add save_run_state call in merlin_store._do_autosave() with current run dict. Verify load_run_state() on restart restores life, cards_played, active_promises, story_log.

Fix reputation_changed.emit() in merlin_store._apply_effect to emit actual delta (new_score - old_score) instead of raw rep_delta. Requires reading current faction_rep value BEFORE calling _apply_faction_reputation, then computing actual_delta.
